name: ASUS Q670EM-IM-A Micro-ATX Industrial Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 2x PCIe x16 - Support DDR5-4400 U-DIMM - 125W TDP - 2x M.2 Slots - USB Type-C - USB 3.2 Gen2 - 4x DisplayPort - 10x COM Ports - 3x Intel LAN Ports (Q670EM-IM-A)
shortName: ASUS Q670EM-IM-A Micro-ATX Industrial Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Industrial Micro-ATX motherboard for LGA 1700 with DDR5, multiple COM ports, and DisplayPort outputs.
